concerns.text: Task IDs T076, T077, T040, T042, T046, T047 referenced in 'Task Parallelism Clarification' section do not appear in the Phase tables (which use R001-R005, D001-D007, I001-I017, T001-T005, DOC001-DOC004). These task IDs originate from spec.md's 'Implementation Tasks' section but are not integrated into the plan's Phase structure, creating cross-document inconsistency.

Phase 3 lists T001-T005 for testing tasks, but 'Task Parallelism Clarification' references T040, T042, T046, T047 which are not in any Phase table. Either integrate these tasks into Phase tables or remove references from Parallelism section to ensure task ID consistency across the plan.
